default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Pixis and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows promising early signals: 16 clicks, 2000 impressions, 1% CTR in the past week](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Shifting focus from programmatic SEO (glossary pages) to link building for domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [AI-generated images for articles being refined; considering templated approach for featured images](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Need to transition AI glossary pages to a blog post format for better indexing](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Last week (Feb 12-18): 16 clicks, \~2000 impressions, \~1% CTR](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Top performing pages:](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
    1.  LLMs for marketing
    2.  Overspending on Google Ads
    3.  Reddit ad formats (ranking on page 1 for target keyword)
  - [Performance data available in shared Google Sheet (pages and queries)](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [Early signals are positive, especially regarding effective titles](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Prioritizing domain authority building over programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [New link acquisition strategy in place](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
      - [Tracking live backlinks in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Planning to add domain authority data from SEMrush](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Continuing with 2 more batches of glossary pages before concluding](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)

### AI Glossary Pages

  - [Current format not suitable for indexing; needs complete overhaul](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Transition required to publish as regular blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Deepak to provide timeline for individual AI glossary pages by EOD](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)

### Article Images

  - [Currently using Midjourney for graphics-based images](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Exploring Adroom for generating background images](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
      - [Initial tests show better quality output compared to Midjourney](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Considering templated approach with brand colors for featured images](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
      - [Awaiting update from Jason on potential design templates](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [10 articles labeled as "ready for fixes review" from last week's batch](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [New assignments for the current week expected by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Deepak to be added to Airtable for article review access](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)

### Analytics Access

  - [Team@GrowthExLabs email to be given access to Google Analytics (GA4)](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Will enable enriched performance reports with engagement rate, bounce rate, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [Deepak to confirm with Jason before granting access](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to send Slack reminder for reviewing and updating last week's content batch](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Deepak to provide timeline for AI glossary page updates by EOD](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Deepak to follow up on potential design templates for featured images](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Aida to continue generating article images using Midjourney/Adroom](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Deepak to confirm GA4 access for GrowthX team with Jason](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [Aida to enrich performance reports with GA4 data once access is granted](https://fathom.video/share/pjyG8uHfqijM1BQ2CrzRj5z2zVWaExz9?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)

action_items.description: Send Slack reminder re reviewing last week's 10 articles labeled "ready for fixes review"
Provide timeline EOD for AI glossary page creation
Check w/ Jason re giving team@GrowthXLabs access to GA4
